headline: General Dynamics (GD) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback And 9.9% Undervaluation Estimate
summary: Why General Dynamics Is On Investors’ Radar Today General Dynamics (GD) is back in focus after recent trading, with the stock last closing at $355.59. With a value score of 4 and annual revenue of about $52.55b, investors are reassessing its profile. See our latest analysis for General Dynamics. Recent trading has been a little softer, with a 1-day share price return decline of 1.77% and a 7-day share price return decline of 2.50%. At the same time, the 1-year total shareholder return of...
